hero.title: Senior Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: 5+ years of experience leading the development of high-performance web and mobile applications. Proficient in JavaScript, React, and TypeScript, spanning full stack from frontend to backend services in Go and Node.js.

items.title: Rick and Morty Explorer
items.description: An animated series explorer following the adventures of a super scientist and his grandson, featuring complex character relationships and intergalactic discoveries.

items.title: Vestra Financial Management
items.description: A comprehensive financial management platform offering expense tracking, recurring transactions, AI assistance, and dashboard analytics to help users achieve financial goals.

jobs.description: Working closely with designers to deliver user-friendly and accessible interfaces. Expanded expertise to backend development using Go (Golang).
achievements: Delivered features such as lead, opportunity, and account management.
Developed a custom dashboard system where the user can select whatever metrics they need and build their own charts, used across the entire application.
Developed a unified dashboard feature with Malloy, SolidJS, and Vega charts.
Developed interactive charts, tables, and analytics dashboards using libraries such as TanStack Table, Recharts, Chart.js, and Radix UI.
Led the redesign of the marketing cloud, collaborating with the design team to create intuitive and visually appealing interfaces with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS.
Implemented comprehensive testing strategies for new features using Vitest, React Testing Library, and Cypress to ensure reliability and maintainability.
Maintained existing API endpoints, introduced new features, and resolved bugs to improve system performance and stability.

jobs.description: Took on a leadership role, guiding my teammates and ensuring smooth development processes. Also hands-on with backend development using PHP.
achievements: Built a chat system with WebSockets and a virtualized list for a smooth user experience, using React, React States, PusherJS, and Sass.
Developed a streaming platform tailored to the Brazilian financial market, leveraging React, React States, Sass, cookies, and Reactstrap.
Created a mobile app for tracking deliveries, integrating push notifications, maps, and custom styles using React Native.
Created a lead management system to handle the entire lead process using React, MUI, and Sass.
Streamlined deployment processes with Docker, AWS, and Bitbucket Pipelines.
Responsible for the deployment process in both Google and Apple stores.

jobs.description: Played a key role in leading and guiding both mobile and web development. Shaped the development flow from start to finish.
achievements: Built a mobile app that lets users locate establishments on a map and access their cameras in real-time, using React Native, Push Notifications, Maps, and NativeWind.
Developed a high-performance, accessible website for a government entity using Next.js and Tailwind.
Created an interactive financial market platform featuring smooth animations and real-time updates, leveraging Next.js, Chakra UI, and Socket.io.
Responsible for the deployment process in both Google and Apple stores.

education.title: Specializations
education.description: NextJS, ReactJS, React Native, TypeScript, Docker.
